calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-19-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-19-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prov-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
John Du Bois, Esq. for Plaintiff: Discover bank fka Greenwood Trust Company.
No appearance of the Defendant: Juan A. Delacruz.
After hearing the evidence presented and declaration of Robert Adkins, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Principal $7,308.11
Prejudgment Interest $768.00
Costs $291.30
Attorneys Fees $675.00, for a Total of $9,042.41
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2005 Set For Trial On Sep-19-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2005 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-29-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Steven H. Shorr, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon. (212)
